sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57545" key="kirsoulki/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κιρσουλκ-ία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n57545.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">this operation</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:45:18:30" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">45.18.30</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
